seoTitle: Tungamah vs Turoar — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tungamah and Turoar. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tungamah and Turoar.
heading: Tungamah vs Turoar — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tungamah, Victoria and Turoar, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tungamah has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Turoar (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tungamah or Turoar safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tungamah has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Turoar scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tungamah scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Turoar scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tungamah or Turoar?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tungamah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
